name: Adt Context
description: Optimize context window usage — compact stale data, compress via summarization, preserve active state
author: Lucas Santana

usage.use_when: The agent session is approaching context limits, or you need to carry important state across many turns without re-reading files.
usage.skip_when: A short one-shot task — skip compaction overhead and just run the task.
prerequisites: Claude Code 0.15+ (or compatible agent with skill support)
good_for: sessions that have already consumed >60% context
